scripts.test:packages: bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/client test && bun run --cwd packages/server test
scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:backend && bun run build:frontend
scripts.test: bun run test:backend && bun run test:packages && bun run test:frontend
scripts.deploy:frontend: bunx turbo run build --filter=@tinychat/frontend && CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=${CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID:-9959301f03d2db1a5fcf5e004278d467} bunx wrangler pages deploy
scripts.deploy:backend:phala: phala deploy --cvm-id ${TINYCHAT_CVM_ID:?set TINYCHAT_CVM_ID} -c docker-compose.phala.yml -e .env.prod -e TINYCHAT_BACKEND_IMAGE=${TINYCHAT_BACKEND_IMAGE:-ghcr.io/tinycloudlabs/tinychat-backend:latest} -e TINYCHAT_INGRESS_IMAGE=${TINYCHAT_INGRESS_IMAGE:-ghcr.io/tinycloudlabs/tinychat-backend:ingress-latest} -e TINYCLOUD_HOST=${TINYCLOUD_HOST:-https://tee.node.tinycloud.xyz} -e PORT=3001 -e PHALA_GATEWAY_CNAME=${PHALA_GATEWAY_CNAME:?set PHALA_GATEWAY_CNAME} --wait && curl -fsS https://api.tinycloud.chat/health && curl -fsS https://api.tinycloud.chat/api/server-info
